concerns.text: Task T019c is marked as pending (unchecked) but is a hard prerequisite for FR-005 (Data Cleaning/Validation) and SC-005 (Dropout Logging). The spec mandates that the system MUST validate incoming session data and exclude incomplete sessions. Without the completion of T019c (runtime schema validation logic), the system cannot enforce the exclusion of incomplete sessions or verify dropout reasons, leaving a critical functional requirement unimplemented.

Task T022 (Shapiro-Wilk normality test logging) is marked as pending (unchecked). The Plan (Phase 3, Action 1) and Spec (FR-002 Amendment) explicitly mandate that normality checks (Shapiro-Wilk) MUST be performed and logged for audit purposes. The absence of this task means the 'audit only' requirement of the amended FR-002 is not deliverable, violating the constraint that normality checks must be logged even if they do not alter the test choice.

Tasks T027a, T027b, and T027c (visualization functions for Completion Time, Error Count, and SUS) are marked as pending. The Plan (Phase 4, Action 1) and Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) require the generation of publication-quality visualizations (box plots with error bars) as a core deliverable. The lack of implementation for these specific visualization tasks means the project cannot produce the required figures, violating the requirement for reproducible visual reporting.

Tasks T029b, T029c, and T030 (GitHub Actions workflow, reproducibility check, and deterministic seed verification) are marked as pending. Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) and NFR-001 mandate that all results must be reproducible on a fresh GitHub Actions runner. The absence of these tasks means the project lacks the automated verification mechanism required to prove reproducibility, violating the non-negotiable Constitution Principle I.

Task T026 (Generate metrics_summary.csv) is marked as pending, though T025d claims to handle it. The Plan (Phase 3, Action 5) explicitly requires the output of `data/processed/metrics_summary.csv` containing ANOVA F-statistics, p-values, and effect sizes. The ambiguity and pending status of T026 create a risk that the primary statistical output artifact required by FR-002 and the Plan will not be generated or verified.
